bornoFlow.title: About BornoFlow
bornoFlow.body: BornoFlow is a comprehensive learning, career, and productivity platform designed specifically for Computer Science, Software Engineering, and IT students.
bornoFlow.mission: Our mission is to provide structured roadmaps, interactive learning, interview preparation, developer tools, university guidance, and career resources—all in one platform.

bornosoft.title: About Bornosoft
bornosoft.body: Bornosoft is a software company focused on building modern web applications, educational platforms, automation tools, SaaS products, and AI-powered solutions that help students, developers, and businesses succeed.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: Empower every student with the tools, knowledge, and guidance needed to become a world-class software engineer.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Build high-quality educational software that bridges the gap between academic learning and real-world industry skills.

products.title: Bornosoft Products
products.bornoMaps: Interactive career roadmaps with 75+ learning paths
products.bornoAi: AI-powered learning assistant and study tools
products.bornoCareer: Resume, ATS checker, interview prep & career hub

founder.title: Built with ❤️ by Mohammad Ali Nayeem
founder.creator: Creator of BornoFlow

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Questions, feedback, or partnership — we'd love to hear from you.
